title: Reproducibility package for secure edge-cloud smart parking with cloud AI inference on a RISC-V platform

creators.name: Alyasari, Mohammed Saad Obaid
creators.affiliation: School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering, Universiti Sains Malaysia

creators.name: Al-Khafaji, Hamza Mohammed Ridha
creators.affiliation: Biomedical Engineering Department, College of Engineering, Al-Mustaqbal University

creators.name: Junoh, Suhardi Azliy
creators.affiliation: School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering, Universiti Sains Malaysia

description: This repository contains the reproducibility package for the manuscript on secure edge-cloud smart parking with cloud AI inference on a RISC-V platform. The package includes processed result tables, representative runtime logs, Node-RED workflow exports, figure-generation scripts, and supporting documentation used to reproduce the main reported findings.
